tracks.meaning: a melody or musical composition, or a song on a recording
to adjust electronic equipment such as a radio or television to receive a particular station or frequency
to adjust or modify something to work properly or efficiently
a person's emotional or mental state or disposition
to change one's attitude or behavior, especially to become more positive or agreeable
in tune: working together harmoniously or in agreement, especially regarding financial or business interests
the act of bringing into harmony or agreement with something else
